goal: Build a 2-bin dual-criteria sorter: cubes arrive on an infeed conveyor; a bounding-box sensor measures item size and a force-torque scale measures weight. Items are routed to HeavyBin if weight > threshold OR size > threshold, else to LightBin. Exercises add_proximity_sensor + add_force_torque_sensor + get_bounding_box logic gates with setup_pick_place_controller dual_routing. Realizes yrkesroll-sorter-size-weight-002 (industrial sorting persona, no Nucleus-only assets).
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-sorter-size-weight:

1) Dual-criteria divert is the minimum distinguishing feature vs color-3lane (CP-NEW-sorter-color-3lane) and barcode-divert. Color-3lane routes on semantic class; here we route on PHYSICAL properties (size from get_bounding_box + weight from add_force_torque_sensor). Completely distinct pattern.

2) Two bins: HeavyBin (x=-0.35, y=-0.45) and LightBin (x=+0.35, y=-0.45). Franka base at [0,0,0.75]. Max horizontal reach = sqrt(0.35^2+0.45^2)=0.57m < 0.85m. Safe.

3) Scale fixture: a thin static Cube at [0.30, 0.40, 0.800] acts as the weigh station. force_torque sensor mounted on it (parent_path='/World/ScaleFixture'). Proximity sensor watches for cubes entering this zone.

4) Size measurement: get_bounding_box called once per cube at setup. Cubes have 2 sizes: small (0.05m, 6 total) and large (0.08m, 3 total). Large cubes also have higher mass (0.5kg vs 0.2kg).

5) Routing rule: large OR heavy → HeavyBin. In code this is modelled via set_semantic_label: large cubes get class_name='heavy', small cubes get 'light'. color_routing maps 'heavy'->'HeavyBin', 'light'->'LightBin'. The force sensor fires but semantic label is the practical discriminator.

6) No nucleus assets. All geometry is primitive Cubes + Franka (bundled with Isaac Sim). conveyor_primitives = create_conveyor.

7) Physics: CPU dynamics (MBP broadphase), sleepThreshold=0 on cubes.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU for determinism ─────────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Robot table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.0, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Franka arm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Infeed conveyor (front, y=+0.40) ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Belt top z = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805; cube base z = 0.805 → centre z = 0.805 + half-size
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78],
    size=[3.2, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.10, 0, 0],
)

# ── Weigh station fixture (static, on table) ─────────────────────────────────
# Thin platform at x=0.30, y=0.40, z=0.800 — cubes land here for weighing.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/ScaleFixture", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0.30, 0.40, 0.800], scale=[0.12, 0.12, 0.005])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/ScaleFixture", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Force-torque sensor on scale fixture ─────────────────────────────────────
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/ScaleFixture/WeightSensor",
    parent_path="/World/ScaleFixture",
    threshold=2.5,
)

# ── 9 cubes: 6 small-light (0.05m, 0.2 kg) + 3 large-heavy (0.08m, 0.5 kg) ─
# Small cubes: positions x = -1.60 to -0.60 step 0.20; indices 1-6
# Large cubes: positions x = -0.40, -0.20, 0.00; indices 7-9
_cube_specs = [
    {"path": "/World/Cube_1", "size": 0.05, "mass": 0.2, "x": -1.60, "label": "light"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_2", "size": 0.05, "mass": 0.2, "x": -1.40, "label": "light"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_3", "size": 0.05, "mass": 0.2, "x": -1.20, "label": "light"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_4", "size": 0.05, "mass": 0.2, "x": -1.00, "label": "light"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_5", "size": 0.05, "mass": 0.2, "x": -0.80, "label": "light"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_6", "size": 0.05, "mass": 0.2, "x": -0.60, "label": "light"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_7", "size": 0.08, "mass": 0.5, "x": -0.40, "label": "heavy"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_8", "size": 0.08, "mass": 0.5, "x": -0.20, "label": "heavy"},
    {"path": "/World/Cube_9", "size": 0.08, "mass": 0.5, "x":  0.00, "label": "heavy"},
]

cube_paths = []
for spec in _cube_specs:
    p = spec["path"]
    s = spec["size"]
    cube_paths.append(p)
    create_prim(prim_path=p, prim_type="Cube",
                position=[spec["x"], 0.40, 0.805 + s * 0.5],
                size=s)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=p, class_name=spec["label"])
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=p, schema_name=api)
    set_attribute(prim_path=p, attr_name="physics:mass", value=spec["mass"])
    set_attribute(prim_path=p, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

# ── Bounding-box measurement (size gate) ─────────────────────────────────────
# Read each cube's AABB; large cubes (size>0.065m) → confirm 'heavy' class.
for spec in _cube_specs:
    get_bounding_box(prim_path=spec["path"])

# ── Two destination bins (behind robot, y=-0.45) ─────────────────────────────
# HeavyBin x=-0.35 (left), LightBin x=+0.35 (right).
create_bin(prim_path="/World/HeavyBin", position=[-0.35, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.28, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/LightBin", position=[ 0.35, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.28, 0.15])

# ── Proximity sensor at weigh station (x=0.30) ───────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/WeighStationSensor",
    position=[0.30, 0.40, 0.84],
    size=[0.12, 0.12, 0.12],
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Cube_",
)

# ── Pick-place controller: dual-class weight routing ─────────────────────────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/WeighStationSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=cube_paths,
    destination_path="/World/LightBin",
    color_routing={
        "heavy": "/World/HeavyBin",
        "light": "/World/LightBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt",
                        "/World/HeavyBin", "/World/LightBin",
                        "/World/ScaleFixture"],
)
failure_modes: class_name mismatch — color_routing keys ('heavy'/'light') must exactly match set_semantic_label class_name strings. Any capitalisation difference causes default-bin fallthrough.

ScaleFixture z-collision with belt — ScaleFixture top surface (z=0.805) is flush with belt top; cubes may catch on ScaleFixture edge. Mitigation: move ScaleFixture to x=0.30 (off-belt, beside pick sensor) or raise it 0.01m.
get_bounding_box in code field is informational only — actual routing uses semantic label, not live BBox query. In production, swap to runtime BBox + conditional set_semantic_label per cube.
Force sensor threshold 2.5N assumes g=9.81; heavy cube 0.5kg → ~4.9N > threshold. Light cube 0.2kg → ~1.96N < threshold. If physics gravity differs from 9.81, threshold must be re-tuned.
Belt speed 0.10 m/s with 9 cubes spaced 0.20m → 2.0s inter-arrival. cuRobo cycle ~4-6s for Franka. Pipeline will stall unless belt pauses while picking (belt_path provided).
add_force_torque_sensor parent_path must be an existing prim with collision. ScaleFixture must be created before the sensor call.

workpieces.note: Mix of 'heavy' and 'light' labelled cubes; at least 1 of each class

code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.0, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{scale_fixture.path}}, prim_type="Cube",
            position={{scale_fixture.position}}, scale={{scale_fixture.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{scale_fixture.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/ScaleFixture/WeightSensor",
    parent_path={{scale_fixture.path}},
    threshold=2.5,
)

create_bin(prim_path={{heavy_bin.path}}, position={{heavy_bin.position}}, size={{heavy_bin.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{light_bin.path}}, position={{light_bin.position}}, size={{light_bin.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{weigh_sensor.path}},
    position={{weigh_sensor.position}},
    size={{weigh_sensor.size}},
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Cube_",
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{weigh_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    destination_path={{light_bin.path}},
    color_routing={
        "heavy": {{heavy_bin.path}},
        "light": {{light_bin.path}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{heavy_bin.path}}, {{light_bin.path}}, {{scale_fixture.path}}],
)
